steps.title: Identify the causal mechanism
steps.content: The decisive clue is the causal chain explained at the end: baleen whales cycle iron in the ocean to support phytoplankton, which sustain krill. This reveals that baleen whale populations directly control the resource that supports phytoplankton populations.

steps.title: Identify the likely effect
steps.content: Therefore, declining baleen whale populations would result in declining phytoplankton—the outcome choice D describes. The other choices describe changes in whale size or krill composition not mentioned in the text, or misidentify where iron concentration changed. That matches choice D — D is correct.
